summary: Phase 3 Robo-Trader (Execution Engine + Auto Trading Loop) — complete testing of all 12 backend endpoints and all Phase 3 frontend UI elements. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend elements verified and functional.

integration_issues.flow: Live mode button click → paper mode button click while modal open
integration_issues.issue: After clicking Live mode (which shows warning modal), clicking Paper mode button doesn't work until the modal is dismissed. This is CORRECT behavior — modal blocks background interactions. Not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid on Start/Stop Auto Mode button (toggle-auto-btn) — added by testing agent

TradingLoop singleton (loop = TradingLoop()) at module level — APScheduler runs in background thread. If backend restarts with an active loop, it will restart fresh (state not persisted). This is acceptable for Phase 3 but consider persisting loop state to MongoDB in future phases.
ExecutionEngine uses in-memory _orders dict — daily reset wipes all open positions without persistence. This is correct for intraday paper trading but should be documented.

trading_loop.py imports dreamer_robo_orchestrator _prefs, _state, _upd, _lock etc. as module-level names — circular import risk if modules loaded in different order. Currently handled with local imports inside _run_cycle(), which is the correct pattern.
robo_router.py line 52: tag is 'Robo Trader — Phase 2' but file has Phase 3 endpoints — minor tag inconsistency, non-breaking.
test_credentials: None required — all endpoints are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Execution Engine + Trading Loop fully tested. Backend: All 7 Phase 3 endpoints working — GET /loop-status (running/interval/cycle_count/market_open), GET /positions (open_positions list with mode), GET /orders (orders list with daily_pnl/win_rate), POST /mode (paper+shadow succeed, live fails with GROWW error, invalid rejected), POST /set-interval, POST /start (starts APScheduler loop), POST /stop, POST /close-all (returns closed_count=0). Frontend: execution-mode-badge (data-testid), mode-btn-paper/shadow/live, interval-btn-1/5/10/15/30, toggle-auto-btn (added by T1), Trading Loop Status section with Running indicator all working. Live mode shows proper warning modal with risk disclosures. Loop starts via APScheduler and shows Scanning... status in header.

frontend_tests_passed: mode-btn-shadow visible and enabled — click switches badge to '👁 SHADOW'
mode-btn-live visible — click shows LIVE TRADING WARNING modal
toggle-auto-btn visible with '▶ Start Auto Mode' text
After clicking Start: header shows '● Scanning...' status
After clicking Start: Trading Loop Status section with 'Running' indicator appears
Loop stops cleanly when Stop Auto Mode clicked
Live warning modal shows all safety info: GROWW_API_KEY required, 30s confirmation delay, 30% size reduction, circuit breakers
